## [00:00 - 01:15]

this section we're going to get into the numbers, the KPIs, understanding how to set up your reporting so that you can be in a position to interpret your test results and make the right decision. So the following videos in this program are going to give you insight into a few different things. So number one, how I use ads manager to set up reports for different scenarios, how to use Facebook reporting, which is an opportunity to create standard templates and things that you can share with others as well. And also more importantly, how I use external tools to build me data insights that I can use without worrying about checking ads manager as well. And it enables me to spend high figures across multiple ad accounts and be in control of everything that's going on. So it doesn't matter if you're spending $100 a day on one ad account or you're spending $50,000 a day but across five or ten ad accounts, this whole process of understanding how to interpret data and how to set up your dashboards and reporting will make a huge difference to your testing, your optimization and your scaling.
